title: Images and Icons in Flutter
content:
### Image Widget

The `Image` widget displays images from various sources.

```dart
// Network image
Image.network('https://example.com/image.jpg')

// Asset image (from pubspec.yaml)
Image.asset('assets/image.png')

// File image
Image.file(File('/path/to/image.jpg'))

// Memory image
Image.memory(bytes)
```

### Image Properties

| Property | Type | Description |
|----------|------|-------------|
| `fit` | `BoxFit` | How to fit the image |
| `width`/`height` | `double?` | Dimensions |
| `alignment` | `Alignment` | Image alignment |
| `color` | `Color?` | Color overlay |
| `colorBlendMode` | `BlendMode` | Blend mode |
| `repeat` | `ImageRepeat` | Image repeat |
| `filterQuality` | `FilterQuality` | Quality vs performance |

### BoxFit Values

| Value | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `cover` | Fill container, crop excess (center) |
| `contain` | Fit entire image inside |
| `fill` | Stretch to fill (may distort) |
| `fitWidth` | Fit to width, crop height |
| `fitHeight` | Fit to height, crop width |
| `none` | Original size |

```dart
Image.network(
  'https://example.com/photo.jpg',
  width: 200,
  height: 150,
  fit: BoxFit.cover,
)
```

### Icon Widget

Icons from Material Design are built-in:

```dart
const Icon(Icons.home, size: 32, color: Colors.blue)
const Icon(Icons.favorite, size: 24, color: Colors.red)
const Icon(Icons.settings, size: 28)
```

### IconButton

```dart
IconButton(
  icon: const Icon(Icons.volume_up),
  onPressed: () => print('Volume up'),
  iconSize: 32,
  color: Colors.blue,
  tooltip: 'Increase volume',
  splashRadius: 24,
)
```

### CircleAvatar

```dart
CircleAvatar(
  radius: 32,
  backgroundImage: NetworkImage('https://example.com/avatar.jpg'),
  child: const Text('AB'), // Fallback initials
)
```

### Asset Images

Register assets in `pubspec.yaml`:

```yaml
flutter:
  assets:
    - assets/
    - assets/images/logo.png
```

> **Key Point:** Use `BoxFit.cover` for thumbnails, `BoxFit.contain` for product images. Register asset paths in `pubspec.yaml`. Use `Icon` for Material icons and `CircleAvatar` for profile pictures.

quiz.question: Which BoxFit value fills the container and crops excess?
Which widget displays a Material Design icon?
